title: Automatic daily or weekly export of boards or groups directly to email

posts.author: abby100a (Abby Fabela)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Set up an automatic daily or weekly export of specific boards or even groups, with the exported file sent directly to designated email addresses.

What are you trying to achieve

Aiming to automate the reporting process in Monday.com by setting up a system that automatically exports board or group data on a daily or weekly basis and sends it directly to designated emails.

This ensures that users receive consistent, up-to-date reports without manual effort, improves visibility into project progress, and maintains regular data backups for reference and accountability.

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @abby100a if you are open to marketplace apps, I suggest you try out Reporting. It allows sending board summarized data to an email On periodically basis.

monday.com

Reporting - monday.com Marketplace

Daily Reports to your mailbox

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
@abby100a For automated reporting of board, group, or any subset of items, I suggest taking a look at the Analytics & Reports by Screenful. With it, you can create reports across multiple boards and schedule them to be sent via email or Slack.

Here’s a guide to get started with a free trial.

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml:
@abby100a Hi there!
If you’re still looking for a solution, we’ve set this up using Power Query and the monday.com APIs to pull data directly from the board. We then use a Power Automate flow to refresh the data monthly and export it to a OneDrive or SharePoint folder.

Let me know if you’d like more details on how to set this up — I’d be happy to walk you through the steps. Thanks!

posts.author: rochelleg (Rochelle Gebelius)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Abby!

In case you’re still looking for more options: You might also want to check out RecapIQ. It automatically summarizes board activity with AI and emails a clean weekly recap to your team.

It’s available on the marketplace with a 14-day free trial if you want to see it in action.
